lorenzo_rules: Align higher-carb meals with John's lifting days (Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday); lower/moderate carbs on other days
End of month: use all on-hand proteins and ingredients before buying new. Freeze only what won't be eaten that week. Prioritize fresh consumption to clear inventory before month-end grocery run.

Sunday afternoons include a batch-cooking block (2-3 hours post-Mass) to prep proteins, soups, and staples for the week ahead. Keep Sunday breakfast/lunch simple and quick to protect rest time before the afternoon work block.
Every dinner includes a carb component (rice, pasta, potato, bread) and at least one vegetable side.
All meals and sides are considered spoiled if a week old. Discard spoiled food immediately. Never suggest meals or components older than one week.
